name: ECE M.S. (Standard Program)
description: MS in Electrical and Computer Engineering — 97 units of graduate coursework (600+). Includes ECE Core, CIT Elective, General Technical Elective, and Intro to Graduate Studies.

categories.name: ECE Core
categories.description: 60 units (or 36 for Intensive Project) of graduate coursework (600+) within ECE (18-XXX). Up to 12 project units can count toward Core.
categories.notes: 18-601 through 18-606 and 18-700 through 18-703 cannot count toward ECE Core but may count toward CIT or General Technical Electives. 18-994 counts as elective only.

categories.name: CIT Elective
categories.description: 24 units (or 12 for Intensive Project) of graduate coursework (600+) within CIT departments. Up to 15 project units can count toward CIT Elective.
categories.notes: 39-699 and 18-994 count as elective only. Excluded CIT courses (19-602, 19-655, 49-7XX, 24-792, 04-6XX/9XX) may still count toward General Technical Elective.

categories.name: General Technical Elective
categories.description: 12 units of coursework (600+) from approved programs or individually approved courses.
categories.notes: 39-699 and 18-994 count as elective only. CIT courses excluded from CIT Elective (e.g. 19-602, 49-7XX) can still count here.

categories.name: Intro to Grad Studies
categories.description: 1 unit — must be taken in your first semester. Conflicts are not permitted.
categories.notes: 18-989 Introduction to Graduate Studies. Required first semester, no conflicts permitted.
